voidDialog.title: Void this sale?
voidDialog.description: This posts a reversal entry that backs out the stock, payments, and balances. The original line items stay visible in history with a Voided marker. This cannot be undone — to redo, post a fresh sale on mobile.
voidDialog.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. wrong customer, wrong items, returned
voidDialog.reasonRequired: Please enter a reason. Audit log needs it.
voidDialog.windowExpired: Void window expired (>7 days). Post a correction sale instead.
voidDialog.ownerOnly: Only the shop owner can void a sale.

saleDetail.linesEmpty: No lines recorded on this sale.

notFound.title: Sale not found
notFound.description: This sale doesn't exist, or you don't have access to it.

empty.title: No sales yet
empty.description: Sales posted from the mobile app appear here, newest first.

noShop.title: No shop selected
noShop.description: Pick or set up a shop to see its sales history.

empty.title: No activity recorded yet
empty.description: Sales, receives, payments, voids — every change posted in this shop appears here.

noShop.title: No shop selected
noShop.description: Pick or set up a shop to see its audit log.

packaging.empty: No packaging configured. Use the mobile app to add pack sizes.

notFound.title: Product not found
notFound.description: This product doesn't exist, or you don't have access to it.

priceDialog.title: Set default sale price
priceDialog.description: Applies to {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}}. The price is set on each product's default-sale packaging (or the base unit if none is marked).
priceDialog.label: Sale price

thresholdDialog.title: Set reorder threshold
thresholdDialog.description: Applies to {count, plural, one {# product} other {# products}}. The threshold is stored in the product's base unit (kg, pc, etc.). Clear the field to remove the threshold.
thresholdDialog.label: Reorder at

bulk.errorPermission: Only owners (or roles with inventory.product.bulk_edit) can run bulk updates.

empty.title: No products yet
empty.description: Activate items from the catalog template, or add custom items from the mobile app.

noShop.title: No shop selected
noShop.description: Pick or set up a shop to see its products.

aging.title: Aging report
aging.subtitle: Outstanding balances by last activity
aging.daysAgo: {days, plural, one {# day ago} other {# days ago}}

empty.receivablesDescription: No customers owe you money right now.
empty.payablesDescription: You don't owe any suppliers right now.

noShop.title: No shop selected
noShop.description: Pick or set up a shop to see its aging report.

empty.sales: No sales recorded for this customer yet.
empty.receives: No receives recorded from this supplier yet.

notFound.title: Party not found
notFound.description: This customer or supplier doesn't exist, or you don't have access to it.

search.customersPlaceholder: Search customers by name or phone…
search.suppliersPlaceholder: Search suppliers by name or phone…

empty.customersDescription: Customers appear here after their first credit sale or payment is recorded on mobile.
empty.suppliersDescription: Suppliers appear here after their first credit receive or payment is recorded on mobile.

noShop.title: No shop selected
noShop.description: Pick or set up a shop to see its customers and suppliers.

noShop.title: No shop selected
noShop.description: Once a shop is set up for you, its dashboard will appear here.

kpis.lowStockUnit: {count, plural, =0 {no items} one {# item} other {# items}}
kpis.salesCount: {count, plural, =0 {no sales} one {# sale} other {# sales}}

modulePlaceholder.notImplemented: This module is scaffolded but not yet implemented. Tracked as {task} in docs/shop-admin-portal-alignment.md.
modulePlaceholder.overview: Today, this week, this month — across all shops.
modulePlaceholder.inventory: Products, stock, adjustments, low stock, top movers, dead stock.
modulePlaceholder.setup: Shop settings, staff, roles, templates, integrations.
modulePlaceholder.audit: Searchable log of every action taken in this shop.

login.title: Sign in
login.emailHelp: We'll email you a sign-in link.
login.emailSentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Click it to continue.
login.emailErrorNoAccount: No account found for that email. Sign up on the mobile app first.
login.emailErrorGeneric: Could not send the link. Try again.
login.errorPhone: Enter a valid phone number, for example +252612345678.
login.errorSend: Could not send the code. Try again.
login.callbackError: That sign-in link didn't work. Try sending another.

noShop.title: No shop selected
noShop.description: Pick or set up a shop to manage its staff.

profile.title: My profile
profile.description: Your name appears wherever the portal shows who did what — in the audit log, the staff list, and reports. Visible to everyone who shares a shop with you.

addDialog.title: Add staff member
addDialog.description: They'll see the shop the next time they sign in — no link or code to share. Just tell them which phone or email to log in with.
addDialog.contactHelp: We detect phone vs. email automatically. Phone numbers default to +252 if you skip the country code.
addDialog.successPhone: Added {phone}. They'll see the shop on next sign-in.
addDialog.successEmail: Added {email}. They'll see the shop on next sign-in.
addDialog.errorInvalidContact: Enter a valid phone (E.164, like +252612345678) or email.
addDialog.errorPermission: Only the shop owner can add staff.

empty.title: Nothing here yet
empty.description: Once there's data to show, it'll appear here.

error.title: Couldn't load
error.description: Something went wrong on our side.

verify.title: Enter your code
verify.errorVerify: That code didn't work. Try again.
